legacy.content:
# Phase 33-01 Summary: Engine vector packs + runtime model loading
## Completed
1. Added `space-vectors` as a first-class engine content pack: - `packages/engine/src/escape-the-dungeon/contracts/data/space-vectors.json` - `SPACE_VECTOR_PACK` export from contracts 2. Added unified runtime resolver for vector pack overrides: - `resolveSpaceVectorPack(overrides?)` - `buildUnifiedSpaceModel(overrides?)` 3. Added runtime thematic-basis import bridge for generated slices: - `thematicBasisTraitsFromGeneratedSlice(slice)` - `withThematicBasisFromGeneratedSlice(slice, overrides?)` 4. Switched item/entity/level projections and behavior defaults to content-pack-driven values. 5. Included `spaceVectors` in content bundle generation script.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` passes. - `node packages/engine/scripts/build-content-pack-bundle.mjs packages/engine/dist/content-pack.bundle.v1.json` passes.
## Notes
- The generated thematic basis slice is treated as source metadata and basis identity signals. - Non-canonical or noisy rows are ignored; canonical `TRAIT_NAMES` are accepted.
